offer_string: "Dear valued customer, we appreciate your loyalty and would like to offer you a 2.5% higher savings return on your deposits for the next 6 months, along with a one-time $200 cashback bonus on your credit card and debit card spends. This exclusive offer is our way of thanking you for being an active member and we hope you'll continue to bank with us."

"Dear valued customer, we appreciate your loyalty and would like to offer you a higher savings return of 1.62% for the next 6 months on your eligible deposits, helping you grow your balance and stay an active member of our community."

Based on the customer's data, we recommend the following retention offer:

"Get a dedicated advisor callback with tailored account guidance to help you make the most of your banking experience, plus a temporary waiver on service and transfer fees for the next 6 months."
